title: Mandarin in Minutes — Lesson 5: Your First Conversation
status: DRAFT — PRE-GATE. Gate 0 required before firing. Mandarin segments flagged for cousin review.
notes: This is the series finale — synthesizes all 5 lessons into a full modelled conversation.
Longer than other episodes by design: ~65s + 5s card = 70s total.
Cousin review: all Mandarin dialogue lines flagged.
Include CTA for AI prompt pack + study guide bundle at end.

config.voice_suffix: warm clear patient teacher voice, natural pacing, Mandarin demo segments delivered slowly and clearly, bilingual fluency implied

shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @ZhangYutongLang-001 + @SET-LANG-BRIGHT-001 STYLE LOCK @STYLE-LANG-TUTOR-001: identical host face, sage green blouse, bright classroom backdrop. Zhang Yutong with warm celebratory energy — the finale, slightly elevated warmth, proud of the student.
shots.speech_text: Lesson Five — your first real conversation. This is the finale. We are going to take everything you have learned and run a complete exchange, start to finish, in Mandarin.

shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @ZhangYutongLang-001 + @SET-LANG-BRIGHT-001 STYLE LOCK @STYLE-LANG-TUTOR-001: identical host face, sage green blouse — seamless continuation. Zhang Yutong setting the scene warmly — scenario setup, slightly storytelling energy.
shots.speech_text: The scenario: you arrive in a Chinese city. You meet someone. You introduce yourself, find out where you are going, buy something, and say goodbye. Let us walk through it.
shots.on_screen:
Scenario: New city.
Meet someone → buy something
→ find your way → goodbye.

shots.cousin_review_note: Verify 'Wǒ jiào ___' for 'My name is ___'. Verify 'Nǐ jiào shénme míngzì?' and 'Hěn gāoxìng rènshi nǐ' are natural and correctly toned. 'Hěn gāoxìng rènshi nǐ' is standard for 'Nice to meet you'.
shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @ZhangYutongLang-001 + @SET-LANG-BRIGHT-001 STYLE LOCK @STYLE-LANG-TUTOR-001: identical host face, sage green blouse — seamless continuation. Zhang Yutong doing introduction exchange — natural gesture, pointing to self for 'wǒ jiào', warm genuine expression.
shots.speech_text: Introductions. Wǒ jiào Zhang Yutong — my name is Zhang Yutong. Fill in your own name. To ask theirs: Nǐ jiào shénme míngzì? Then the connection phrase: Hěn gāoxìng rènshi nǐ — very happy to meet you.
shots.on_screen:
我叫___。Wǒ jiào ___.
My name is ___.

你叫什么名字？
What's your name?

很高兴认识你。
Nice to meet you.

shots.cousin_review_note: Verify 'Nǐ shì nǎ guó rén?' and 'Wǒ shì Měiguó rén / Yīngguó rén' are natural. Standard small-talk phrases.
shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @ZhangYutongLang-001 + @SET-LANG-BRIGHT-001 STYLE LOCK @STYLE-LANG-TUTOR-001: identical host face, sage green blouse — seamless continuation. Zhang Yutong in friendly curious expression — classic first-meeting question energy.
shots.speech_text: They will ask where you are from. Nǐ shì nǎ guó rén? — what country are you from? Answer: Wǒ shì Měiguó rén — I am American. Or Yīngguó rén for British. Swap the country name.
shots.on_screen:
你是哪国人？
Nǐ shì nǎ guó rén?
Where are you from?

我是美国人 / 英国人
I'm American / British

shots.cousin_review_note: Full transaction phrases are a recap from Lesson 3. Verify smooth delivery as summary.
shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @ZhangYutongLang-001 + @SET-LANG-BRIGHT-001 STYLE LOCK @STYLE-LANG-TUTOR-001: identical host face, sage green blouse — seamless continuation. Zhang Yutong in energetic recall mode — walking through the Lesson 3 sequence with confident fluency, as if demonstrating that the student can do this.
shots.speech_text: Now the market sequence you already know. Wǒ yào zhè ge — I want this one. Duōshao qián? — how much? If too expensive: Tài guì le. Pay up: Gěi nǐ. Xièxiè. You have done this.
shots.on_screen:
我要这个 → 多少钱？
太贵了 → 给你 → 谢谢

[Lessons 1–3 in action]

shots.cousin_review_note: Recall phrases from Lesson 4. Verify 'Wǒ bù zhīdào, duìbuqǐ' flows naturally as one expression.
shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @ZhangYutongLang-001 + @SET-LANG-BRIGHT-001 STYLE LOCK @STYLE-LANG-TUTOR-001: identical host face, sage green blouse — seamless continuation. Zhang Yutong in navigation mode energy — slightly looking around gesture, then focused direct address.
shots.speech_text: You need to find your hotel. Chūzūchē zài nǎlǐ? — Where is the taxi? Or: Jiǔdiàn zài nǎlǐ? — Where is the hotel? And if someone asks you something you do not know: Wǒ bù zhīdào, duìbuqǐ — I do not know, sorry.
shots.on_screen:
出租车在哪里？
Where is the taxi?

酒店在哪里？
Where is the hotel?

我不知道，对不起。

shots.cousin_review_note: Verify 'Zàijiàn' and 'Bǎozhòng' are both appropriate sign-off options. 'Bǎozhòng' (take care) is warm and slightly more personal — decide if to include or keep just Zàijiàn.
shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @ZhangYutongLang-001 + @SET-LANG-BRIGHT-001 STYLE LOCK @STYLE-LANG-TUTOR-001: identical host face, sage green blouse — seamless continuation. Zhang Yutong warm natural farewell energy — saying goodbye the way someone would at the end of a real conversation.
shots.speech_text: To close: Zàijiàn — goodbye. Or for a warmer goodbye: Bǎozhòng — take care of yourself. That is the full conversation. You introduced yourself, bought something, found your way, and said goodbye. All in Mandarin.
shots.on_screen:
再见 Zàijiàn
Goodbye

保重 Bǎozhòng
Take care

shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @ZhangYutongLang-001 + @SET-LANG-BRIGHT-001 STYLE LOCK @STYLE-LANG-TUTOR-001: identical host face, sage green blouse — seamless continuation. Zhang Yutong warm direct address to camera — final lesson wrap, genuine connection, teacher proud of the student, clear and warm.
shots.speech_text: That is Mandarin in Minutes — all five lessons. You have the tones, the numbers, a full transaction, questions, and your first conversation. Your complete bundle includes all five study guides, the AI prompt pack to keep practising, and the tone reference card. I am Zhang Yutong. Xièxiè. And zàijiàn.
